'Gathering Dark Clouds' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.
'@#$'s Hand I Let Slip' inflicts Bleed via the support passive — scales off Bleed count/potency on the target.

core_idea: The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote is a Tank / Support applying sustained Bleed, Bloodfeast pressure with consistent skill stats. Scaling conditions: +10% per 100 Bloodfeast consumed. Support passive (**‘Feed your repressed hunger, my Family’**) applies at **Combat Start** — set deployment with your lowest-HP ally before turn one.
playstyle_guide:
- **‘Feed your repressed hunger, my Family’** fires at **Combat Start** — confirm roster and slot order pre-fight so the right ally receives the buff.
- Reach scaling conditions before committing S3: +10% per 100 Bloodfeast consumed.

**S1 — Enough is Enough** (BP 3, CP +4, x2): rolls — low 3, high 11 (Low / Slightly High stacked).
- On Hit with this Skill: heal 30% of the HP damage dealt (max 10) ; [On Use] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Hardblood for every 5 Bloodfeast this unit consumed ; - If this unit failed to consume Bloodfeast, gain 5 Bleed ; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 6 Bleed on target (max 2)

*↳ Alternate S1 — Variant Sancho Hardblood Arts 6 - Whip* (BP 4, CP +3): rolls — low 4, high 13 (Extremely High).
  - Unbreakable Coin

**S2 — Let All Blossom Free** (BP 4, CP +6, x2): rolls — low 4, high 16 (Slightly Low / Extremely High stacked).
- On Hit with this Skill: heal 30% of the HP damage dealt (max 10) ; [On Use] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Hardblood for every 10 Bloodfeast this unit consumed ; - If this unit failed to consume Bloodfeast, gain 5 Bleed ; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 6 Bleed on target (max 2) ; [Before Attack] Atk Weight +1 for every 10 Hardblood on self (max 2)
- Deal +2.5% damage for every Bleed on target (max 25%); Deal +10% damage for every 100 Bloodfeast Consumed by self (max 50%)

*↳ Alternate S2 — Variant Sancho Hardblood Arts 8 - Split Apart* (BP 4, CP +3): rolls — low 4, high 13 (Extremely Low / Slightly High stacked).
  - Stacks 2 Bleed — use every appearance to build up.

**S3 — I Shall Impale** (BP 5, CP +4, x3): rolls — low 5, high 17 (Average / Extremely High stacked).
- On Hit with this Skill: heal 50% of the HP damage dealt (max 10) ; [On Use] Clash Power +1 for every 10 Hardblood (max 2) ; [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 5 Bleed on target (max 2) ; [On Use] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Hardblood for every 10 Bloodfeast consumed ; - If this unit failed to consume Bloodfeast, gain 10 Bleed ; Deal +5% damage for every Bleed on target (max 50%) ; Deal +20% damage for every 100 Bloodfeast Consumed by self (max 100%) ; [Attack End] If target is defeated, increase Bloodfeast by 60; gain 10 Hardblood (once per turn)

*↳ Alternate S3 — Ascendant Sancho Hardblood Arts - La Sangre* (BP 5, CP +5): rolls — low 5, high 25 (Extremely High).
  - Unbreakable Coin

Combat passive — **Bloodfeast**: If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase Bloodfeast value by the amount of Bleed damage c….
  - When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will fill the surface.
  - When consuming Bloodfeast, if there are <> Kindreds of the same generation as this unit, this unit takes precedence.

Combat passive — **Armadura de Sangre**: Attack End: If the enemy is defeated, increase Bloodfeast by 10% of the target's max HP (100 per turn.
  - for Focused Encounters, if the Part is broken).
  - Gain 1 Damage Up next turn for every 15% missing HP at Turn End (max 3).

Defense skill — **Counter: Laughters Shall Subside**: [Clashable Counter].
  - [Combat Start] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Hardblood for every 10 Bloodfeast.
  - If this unit failed to consume Bloodfeast, gain 10 Bleed.
  - [Combat Start] To 1 ally with the least HP: apply Shimmering — Bloodfiend — for every 50 Bloodfeast Consumed (shared) (max 15, once per turn).

*Alternate skills activate when [La Manchaland, Bloodfiend] allies are on the team.*
team_suggestions: La Manchaland support — pair with same-generation [Second Kindred] allies to unlock alternate Hardblood skills and strengthen Bloodfeast passives. Resonance-scaling identity — each additional [La Manchaland] ally on the team directly improves skill and Counter output. Same-faction teammates provide additional passive synergy where available. The support passive also benefits teammates directly — consider this identity even in compositions where it is not the primary damage dealer.
- **The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion**: Shares [Second Kindred] trait — same-generation ally activates this identity's trait-conditional passive and alternate skills.
- **The Barber of La Manchaland Outis**: Shares [La Manchaland] — feeds the shared Bloodfeast pool and strengthens allied Hardblood / Bloodfeast passives.
- **The Priest of La Manchaland Gregor**: Shares [La Manchaland] — feeds the shared Bloodfeast pool and strengthens allied Hardblood / Bloodfeast passives.
